ProjectTechnicalDetails.TechnicalDescription: High-rise office building with energy-efficient façade, smart building systems, and underground parking.

IdentifiedRisks.Description: Working at height — façade installation above 15m
IdentifiedRisks.Mitigation: Scaffolding plan approved, fall protection in place

IdentifiedRisks.Description: Underground parking excavation — risk of ground collapse and utility conflicts
IdentifiedRisks.Mitigation: Utility survey completed, shoring plan in place

IdentifiedRisks.Description: Dense urban site — risk of falling objects affecting public
Installation of smart building systems — electrical hazards in occupied areas
IdentifiedRisks.Mitigation: Hot work permits required, zones defined

IdentifiedRisks.Description: Crane operations adjacent to public road
IdentifiedRisks.Mitigation: Traffic management plan approved by Stockholm municipality

SpecialConditions: Dense urban location with active public pedestrian zone adjacent to site
Crane operations require municipality permit — renewed monthly
Night work restrictions apply (22:00–07:00) per local noise ordinance
Concurrent contractors on site — coordination meeting every Monday 08:00

PendingActions.Description: Renew crane operation permit with Stockholm municipality
Follow-up meeting with BAS-U — review hot work permit process for smart systems installation
Update AMP to include new electrical subcontractor (Elbygg Stockholm AB)
Safety introduction for 3 new workers arriving next week

RecentIncidents.Description: Near-miss — unsecured material fell from floor 8 scaffolding, no injuries
RecentIncidents.ActionTaken: Immediate site stop, scaffolding inspection, toolbox talk conducted
